## Summary

- **Director Engine** — scene prompts, visual craft, export to any video AI
- **Music video paths A–E** — track, paste, BOTH, manuscript, audio + picture beat-sync
- **Path E** — beat sync, lip-sync scaffold, full track (max 480s) or highlight window, auto i2v
- **Desktop** — Windows installer with GitHub auto-update

## Install

Download **AI-Video-Creator-Setup-X.Y.Z.exe** from this release. Existing installs update automatically when a newer release is published.
